title: The Work
subtitle: Style Test — Brazilian Street Art / Tropical
author: AugmentedMike

panels.caption: 2 AM. The machine never sleeps.
panels.prompt: Brazilian street art and mural style — think Os Gemeos meets Hebru Brantley meets vibrant Latin American muralism. Intense saturated tropical colors: vivid orange, electric teal, hot magenta, bright yellow, deep violet. Bold expressive figures with slightly elongated stylized proportions. A figure at a computer desk surrounded by vivid color — the room itself alive with warm muralist energy. Graphic, vital, bursting with life and color. Strong outlines. No text, no speech bubbles.

panels.caption: Something's wrong.
panels.prompt: Brazilian street art / muralist style. Intense saturated colors — magenta, teal, orange. Close-up face with the stylized quality of mural art — slightly elongated, expressive, vivid. The screen throws teal and orange light. The expression clear and strong. Bold graphic quality, vivid color relationships, the warmth and energy of Latin American street art. No text.

panels.caption: The logs don't lie. The logic does.
panels.prompt: Street art muralist style, tropical colors. The error visualized with bold graphic energy — a disruption in the pattern, a wrong color in a colorful composition. The figure confronting it with the direct energy of mural art. Hot orange and deep violet clash. Saturated, vivid, alive with color tension. Strong outlines, bold shapes. No text.

panels.caption: There.
panels.prompt: Tropical street art close-up. The discovery — a single bright point in the composition, a yellow starburst accent in an ocean of vivid colors. The face showing recognition, rendered in the warm stylized quality of Brazilian mural portraiture. Saturated palette. The eureka moment feels celebratory even in miniature. No text.

panels.caption: Fix it. Ship it. Move on.
panels.prompt: Brazilian muralist art style. The fix — vivid motion, the figure in decisive action surrounded by warm tropical color. Hot orange, electric teal, bright yellow. Bold graphic energy. The screen blazes green-gold with success. The whole panel feels like a celebration of work. Vivid, warm, alive. No text.

panels.caption: 3:17 AM. Tests pass. The city doesn't know. Doesn't need to.
panels.prompt: Brazilian street art wide mural-style panel. The figure at the desk, the city outside the window rendered in the vivid style of a tropical mural — buildings in vivid orange and turquoise and magenta, the night sky deep violet, stars like bright yellow dots, the whole scene humming with color and life. The screen glows warm gold. The city is alive and beautiful even at 3am. No text.
